acceptance.assertion: The helper never fills PASS, clean findings, or terminal triage without explicit operator-provided review content.
The helper refreshes and verifies current PR head and diff hash before writing completed evidence.
Completed evidence is written create-only or with explicit stale-evidence archival; existing evidence is not silently overwritten.
Tests cover stale template rejection, missing operator review content, create-only behavior and successful completed-evidence validation.

goal: Add a safe helper that guides creation of completed self-review evidence from a template without auto-claiming that review was performed.

metadata.reason: A helper may reduce manual JSON errors, but automatic evidence generation would be self-deceptive if folded into PR #111.

title: Add guided self-review evidence authoring
